subtitles.original: おっけー！ すばるチャンネル！
subtitles.english: Okay! Subaru Channel!

subtitles.original: Everyday, night and day, みんなで！
subtitles.english: Every day, night and day, everyone together!

subtitles.original: ブルーな気持ちにツバっとかけつけ
subtitles.english: Rushing in to clear away your blue feelings,

subtitles.original: お助けしちゃうヒーロー！
subtitles.english: I'm the hero who'll come to your rescue!

subtitles.original: 弱いハートはいらないから
subtitles.english: Since a weak heart is no use,

subtitles.original: つよつよで行きましょう！
subtitles.english: let's go forward, strong and bold!

subtitles.original: ハラハラな水際で
subtitles.english: At the thrilling water's edge,

subtitles.original: ドキドキのときめきタイム
subtitles.english: it's time for heart-pounding excitement!

subtitles.original: いつでもおいでよ
subtitles.english: Come visit anytime,

subtitles.original: 年中パラダイス
subtitles.english: it's a year-round paradise!

subtitles.original: カウントダウン
subtitles.english: Countdown,

subtitles.original: 曇り空吹き飛ばそう！
subtitles.english: let's blow away the cloudy skies!

subtitles.original: あがれ！サンシャイン！
subtitles.english: Rise! Sunshine!

subtitles.original: どんな暗闇の中も眩しく照らす
subtitles.english: Brightly illuminating even the deepest darkness.

subtitles.original: 君に見つけてもらえた
subtitles.english: That you were able to find me...

subtitles.original: それだけでもう運命なんだ
subtitles.english: ...in itself is already destiny.

subtitles.original: もっとずっと道は続いていく
subtitles.english: This road will keep on going forever,

subtitles.original: 夢に向かって
subtitles.english: heading toward our dreams.

subtitles.original: 一緒に生きてくれるかな
subtitles.english: Will you live this life with me?

subtitles.original: その手取って走れ
subtitles.english: Take my hand and run!

subtitles.original: 連れていくよみんなで！
subtitles.english: I'll take everyone along with us!

subtitles.original: ささやく 恥ずかしいけれど
subtitles.english: I whisper, even though it's embarrassing,

subtitles.original: 伝えたい想い 今なら言える
subtitles.english: but I can say these feelings now.

subtitles.original: 君のエールが力になるよ
subtitles.english: Your cheers become my strength,

subtitles.original: いつも元気を分けてくれて
subtitles.english: always sharing your energy with me.

subtitles.original: 頑張っていけるんだ
subtitles.english: I can keep doing my best,

subtitles.original: 笑って過ごせるんだ 本当に
subtitles.english: and truly spend my days smiling.

subtitles.original: ありがとうのこの気持ちを
subtitles.english: These feelings of gratitude,

subtitles.original: 歌え！
subtitles.english: sing them out!

subtitles.original: シャイン！
subtitles.english: Shine!

subtitles.original: どんな輝きの中も強くきらめき
subtitles.english: Sparkling strongly amidst any radiance.

subtitles.original: 君に届いているかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if it's reaching you?

subtitles.original: 1ミリでも伝わればいいな
subtitles.english: I hope it transmits to you, even just a millimeter.

subtitles.original: もっとずっと道は続いていく
subtitles.english: This road will keep on going forever,

subtitles.original: 夢に向かって
subtitles.english: heading toward our dreams.

subtitles.original: 一緒に生きてくれるかな
subtitles.english: Will you live this life with me?

subtitles.original: その手取って走れ
subtitles.english: Take my hand and run!

subtitles.original: 連れていくよみんなで！
subtitles.english: I'll take everyone along with us!

subtitles.original: 君とかけるすばる！
subtitles.english: Running with you, Subaru!

subtitles.original: すばる先輩ありがとうございました！後半もよろしくします！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much, Subaru-senpai! Please enjoy the second half!

subtitles.original: コボ、がんばれー！
subtitles.english: Kobo, do your best!

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとうー！
subtitles.english: Happy birthday!

subtitles.original: 誰かのための痛み？
subtitles.english: Someone's pain for someone else?

subtitles.original: 僕の願い、やがて散り散り
subtitles.english: My wish, eventually scattered...

subtitles.original: 椅子取りゲームみたい
subtitles.english: ...like a game of musical chairs.

subtitles.original: それでも、息をしていくしかない
subtitles.english: Still, I have no choice but to keep breathing.

subtitles.original: まだ、聞こえるか？
subtitles.english: Can you still hear it?

subtitles.original: とっくのとうに詰まった呼吸
subtitles.english: Breath already blocked long ago.

subtitles.original: 関係ない、うるせえわ 自分だけが聞こえてる
subtitles.english: Doesn't matter, shut up. Only I can hear it.

subtitles.original: 安定なんて捨てた
subtitles.english: I threw away stability.

subtitles.original: もう、すべてを振り切るスピードで
subtitles.english: Now, at a speed that cuts through everything!

subtitles.original: その瞬間まで、足掻いて
subtitles.english: Until that moment, struggling,

subtitles.original: ただ、脳絞って、今、見えるとこまで
subtitles.english: just squeeze your brain, now, to where you can see.

subtitles.original: この瞬間を飲み干して、また踊って
subtitles.english: Drink down this moment, and dance again.

subtitles.original: 見たことないもの、見せて
subtitles.english: Show me something I've never seen before.

subtitles.original: 「君の代わりはいない」
subtitles.english: “No one can replace you,”

subtitles.original: もし、誰かが否定しても
subtitles.english: even if someone denies it.

subtitles.original: 僕の代わりはいない
subtitles.english: No one can replace me,

subtitles.original: 違うことない、僕の目覚まし
subtitles.english: undoubtedly, my awakening.

subtitles.original: 誰かの祈る手を払った痛み
subtitles.english: The pain of brushing away someone’s praying hands,

subtitles.original: どこから漂う悪意の兆し
subtitles.english: where does the sign of drifting malice come from?

subtitles.original: 正しさに息を潜めた怒り
subtitles.english: Anger hidden in righteousness,

subtitles.original: それすらも僕に残った光
subtitles.english: even that light remained in me.

subtitles.original: 誰かの熱を奪う感覚
subtitles.english: The sensation of stealing heat from anyone,

subtitles.original: 逃げる気はとうにないぜ、全く
subtitles.english: no intention to run away, not at all.

subtitles.original: この手が震えるほどの錯覚が、起こした摩擦
subtitles.english: A hallucination that makes this hand tremble, caused friction.

subtitles.original: まだ、見えてるか？
subtitles.english: Can you still see it?

subtitles.original: とっくにスポットライトを奪った
subtitles.english: Already took away the spotlight.

subtitles.original: 関係ない、うるせえわ
subtitles.english: Doesn't matter, shut up.

subtitles.original: 自分だけに聴かせてる
subtitles.english: I'm only letting myself hear it.

subtitles.original: 安定なんてやめだ
subtitles.english: No more stability.

subtitles.original: もう、すべてを振り切るスピードで
subtitles.english: Now, at a speed that cuts through everything!

subtitles.original: この瞬間だけ、足掻いたって意味ないぜ
subtitles.english: Struggling in this moment is meaningless.

subtitles.original: 今、見えるとこまで
subtitles.english: Now, to where you can see.

subtitles.original: 第六感で惹きあって、また踊って
subtitles.english: Drawn by the sixth sense, dance again.

subtitles.original: 見たことないものを、見せて
subtitles.english: Show me something I've never seen before.

subtitles.original: 今をブチ抜いて！
subtitles.english: Pierce through the present!

subtitles.original: もう、ノンストップで脳、擦り切れるまで
subtitles.english: Already nonstop, until the brain is worn out.

subtitles.original: この瞬間を飲み干して、また踊って
subtitles.english: Drink down this moment, and dance again.

subtitles.original: 見たことないもの、見せて
subtitles.english: Show me something I've never seen before.

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Breakdown**

Okay, here's the deal. I've got this video, and the task is clear: produce killer, synchronized subtitles. We're talking Japanese (original), English (translation), and the correct timings down to the millisecond. The reference JSON helps with "SPEED," but "ぶ・れ・あ・です！" is on me, completely.

First, I break down the video. The first song, "ぶ・れ・あ・です！" (Bu-Re-A-De-Su!), is manual transcription and translation, I'll need to listen, and write. The intermission (Subaru shouting birthday wishes!) is also manual. Then, we hit "SPEED", which is where the reference JSON gives me a boost, but I'm still verifying.

The first song is time-consuming, I'll take a deep dive into listening carefully, and transcribing:
*   *00:00.000 - 00:02.800*: "おっけー！ すばるチャンネル！" (Ok, Subaru Channel!) / "Okay! Subaru Channel!"
*   *00:02.800 - 00:05.400*: "Everyday, night and day, みんなで！" (Everyday, night and day, minna de!) / "Every day, night and day, everyone together!"
*   *00:11.800 - 00:14.600*: "ブルーな気持ちにツバっとかけつけ" (Rushing in to clear away your blue feelings) / "Rushing in to clear away your blue feelings,"
*   *00:14.600 - 00:18.000*: "お助けしちゃうヒーロー！" (I'm the hero who'll come to your rescue!) / "I'm the hero who'll come to your rescue!"
*   *00:18.000 - 00:21.000*: "弱いハートはいらないから" (Since a weak heart is no use) / "Since a weak heart is no use,"
*   *00:21.000 - 00:24.400*: "つよつよで行きましょう！" (Let's go forward, strong and bold!) / "let's go forward, strong and bold!"
*   *00:27.400 - 00:30.200*: "ハラハラな水際で" (At the thrilling water's edge) / "At the thrilling water's edge,"
*   *00:30.200 - 00:33.800*: "ドキドキのときめきタイム" (It's time for heart-pounding excitement!) / "it's time for heart-pounding excitement!"
*   *00:33.800 - 00:36.500*: "いつでもおいでよ" (Come visit anytime) / "Come visit anytime,"
*   *00:36.500 - 00:38.200*: "年中パラダイス" (It's a year-round paradise) / "it's a year-round paradise!"
*   *00:38.200 - 00:40.400*: "カウントダウン" (Countdown) / "Countdown,"
*   *00:40.400 - 00:44.000*: "曇り空吹き飛ばそう！" (Let's blow away the cloudy skies!) / "let's blow away the cloudy skies!"
*   *00:44.000 - 00:46.500*: "あがれ！サンシャイン！" (Rise! Sunshine!)
*   *00:46.500 - 00:49.400*: "どんな暗闇の中も眩しく照らす" (Illuminating even the deepest darkness.)
*   *00:49.400 - 00:52.800*: "君に見つけてもらえた" (That you were able to find me...) / "That you were able to find me..."
*   *00:52.800 - 00:56.500*: "それだけでもう運命なんだ" (...in itself is already destiny.) / "...in itself is already destiny."
*   *00:5
